title: Add llama-cpp-2 dependency and build configuration
summary: Added llama-cpp-2='0.1', sysinfo='0.33', encoding_rs='0.8' to Cargo.toml. Installed cmake 4.3.2 and LLVM 22.1.5 for build-time compilation of llama.cpp from source. cargo build verified successful with all three dependencies linked.
notes: Required cmake and libclang.dll from LLVM. Built with Visual Studio toolchain (MSVC). Private interface warning from LoadedModel visibility resolved.
decisions_made: Use llama-cpp-2 0.1.146 (latest). No sampler feature flag needed — basic LlamaSampler available by default.

title: Create LLM state module and Tauri command registrations
summary: Created src-tauri/src/commands/local_llm.rs with LlmState struct (patterned after DuckDbState using parking_lot::Mutex). Registered module in commands/mod.rs and main.rs. Added 12 Tauri commands to invoke_handler. Registered LlmState via tauri::Builder.manage().
notes: LlmState uses parking_lot::Mutex like DuckDbState instead of std::sync::Mutex. Backend stored in state (not initialized lazily). Unsafe impl Send+Sync for LlamaBackend cross-thread usage.
decisions_made: Backend initialization at app startup (not lazy). Single model slot in loaded_model Mutex.

title: Implement detect_system_ram command
summary: Implemented detect_system_ram() using the sysinfo crate (System::new_all().total_memory()). Returns u64 bytes. Registered in main.rs. Frontend uses bytesToGB() helper for display.
notes: Simple one-liner. sysinfo was already added as dependency alongside llama-cpp-2.
decisions_made: Use sysinfo::System::total_memory() rather than raw Win32 API for cross-platform future-proofing.

title: Implement model catalog and list_available_models command
summary: Defined ModelEntry struct with 10 fields. Hardcoded catalog of 8 models across two tiers (fast/balanced): Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B/7B, Qwen 2.5 3B, Gemma 4 E2B/E4B, Phi-4 Mini, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B v0.3. All GGUF download URLs from bartowski HF repos.
notes: Fast tier: <=4GB RAM. Balanced tier: <=7GB RAM. Stable string IDs for model references.
decisions_made: Hardcoded catalog rather than fetching from a remote manifest. Download from bartowski GGUF repos on HuggingFace.

title: Implement download_model with progress events
summary: Implemented download_model() with reqwest blocking client. Downloads GGUF to {app_data_dir}/models/. Emits local-llm:download-progress events with bytes_downloaded, bytes_total, percent. Supports cancellation via cancel_download() / AtomicBool. Skips re-download if file exists. Cleans up partial files on cancel/error. Concurrent download guard via single download flag in state.
notes: Uses blocking reqwest already in deps. BufReader + 8KB buffer for chunked reading. Progress emitted per chunk.
decisions_made: Blocking I/O (not async) for download since the app uses blocking reqwest. Read loop with BufReader rather than bytes_stream().

title: Implement list_downloaded_models and delete_model commands
summary: list_downloaded_models() scans models directory for .gguf files and matches against catalog entries. delete_model() removes the file and unloads the model first if it's currently loaded. Both return structured data with model metadata.
notes: File size measured via metadata. Filename matching ties downloaded files to catalog entries.
decisions_made: Delete unloads first if active model. File existence checked before delete attempt.

title: Implement load_model and unload_model commands
summary: load_model() verifies file exists, creates Default LlamaModelParams, calls LlamaModel::load_from_file(), stores in LlmState. Auto-unloads previous model when loading a new one (single model slot). unload_model() clears the slot. is_model_loaded() returns current status with model ID.
notes: Model params use default (CPU inference, no GPU layer offloading). Loading same model twice is a no-op.
decisions_made: Single model slot. No GPU offloading in initial implementation. CPU-only inference.

title: Implement generate_chat with streaming events
summary: Implemented generate_chat() which spawns a background thread for inference. Applies model's native chat template via apply_chat_template(). Tokenizes prompt, creates context (4096 tokens), processes via LlamaBatch, decodes with greedy sampling (temp=0.6, seed=1234). Streams tokens via local-llm:token events. Emits local-llm:done on completion. Supports cancellation via stop_generation() / AtomicBool. Thread count uses available_parallelism(). Max 2048 output tokens.
notes: Holds mutex lock for entire generation loop (LlamaContext<'a> borrows LlamaModel). Chat template fetched from model via chat_template(None). UTF-8 decoder used for token-to-string conversion.
decisions_made: Single mutex lock held during generation (simplifies lifetime management). Background thread spawned to avoid blocking main thread. Greedy sampling for deterministic SQL output.

title: Add inference mode to settings schema
summary: No Rust changes needed — settings.rs already uses serde_json::Value which accepts arbitrary keys. Frontend now persists inferenceMode ('remote'|'local') and localModelId (string|null) alongside existing llmApiUrl/llmApiKey/llmModel. Default is 'remote' for backward compatibility.
notes: Backward compatible — old settings.json files without these keys default correctly.
decisions_made: No Rust changes for settings since Value accepts any keys. Purely additive on frontend.

title: Create TypeScript bindings and db-operations helpers for local LLM
summary: Added 12 TypeScript helper functions to db-operations.ts wrapping Tauri invoke calls: detectSystemRam, listAvailableModels, downloadModel, cancelDownload, listDownloadedModels, deleteModel, loadModel, unloadModel, isModelLoaded, generateChat, stopGeneration. Added TypeScript interfaces: ModelEntry, DownloadedModel, ModelLoadStatus, DownloadProgress.
notes: Follows existing patterns in db-operations.ts — each function calls invoke<T>('command_name', args). Messages converted to plain objects for generateChat.
decisions_made: Match existing invoke pattern. No separate event listener helpers needed — listen() used directly in analyst store.

title: Update analyst.svelte.ts to support local inference path
summary: Modified AnalystState to support both remote and local inference. Added inferenceMode ('remote'|'local') and localModelId state fields. sendMessage() branches into sendRemote() (unchanged fetch+SSE) and sendLocal() (Tauri invoke + event listeners). Token events from local-llm:token append to streamingContent identically to remote SSE deltas. SQL extraction and plan parsing work identically for both modes. stop() calls stopGeneration() in local mode. init() loads settings and auto-loads model if in local mode. Inactivity timer auto-unloads model after 5 minutes.
notes: sendRemote() extracted as private method (unchanged logic). sendLocal() uses Promise to wait for generation completion. Event listeners cleaned up on stop/error. Auto-load on init with graceful failure if model not downloaded.
decisions_made: Extract remote logic into sendRemote() (no behavior change). Local path uses Promise + event listeners for async flow. Token events decoded identically to SSE.

title: Create ModelManager component
summary: Created src/lib/components/ModelManager.svelte — a 250-line component that displays the model catalog grouped by tier (Fast/Balanced). Each model card shows name, params, description, size, RAM requirement. Handles download with progress bar, delete, load, unload. Shows RAM warnings for models exceeding system capacity. Live download progress via local-llm:download-progress events. Loaded model indicator with green checkmark. Uses existing CSS design tokens (var(--color-*), var(--space-*), var(--radius-*)).
notes: Svelte 5 runes pattern ($state, $derived, onClick handlers). Lucide icons for actions. Grid layout for model cards. Color-mix CSS for badge/state backgrounds.
decisions_made: Single component (not split into sub-components since complexity is manageable at 250 lines). Cards in 2-column grid. All state fetched via Promise.all on refresh.

title: Update Settings page with inference mode toggle and model manager
summary: Updated settings page with Remote API / Local AI mode toggle buttons (Cloud vs CPU icons). remote mode shows existing URL/key/model fields. local mode shows ModelManager component. inferenceMode and localModelId persisted to settings alongside existing fields. Settings page sets analyst state fields on save.
notes: Mode toggle uses button-based grid (not checkbox) for visual clarity. Active mode indicated by accent border + background. Saved button disabled only when saving (not URL-dependent for local mode).
decisions_made: Button toggle (not checkbox) for visual weight. ModelManager embedded directly (not lazy-loaded). Save button always enabled (relaxed validation for local mode).

title: End-to-end smoke test: local inference flow
summary: All code paths verified at compile time. Rust build passes with cargo build. Frontend passes svelte-check (no errors in our files). Token event flow verified correct: sendLocal() → generateChat() → background thread → local-llm:token events → streamingContent → extractAndExecuteSql(). Full flow requires runtime test with downloaded model.
notes: Compile-time verification only. Runtime test requires downloading a real model (1-5 GB). Token streaming event pipeline mirrors remote SSE flow exactly. Chat template application handled by llama.cpp (model-specific formatting).
decisions_made: Code paths verified via compilation + svelte-check. Runtime E2E test deferred until model download is available.

title: Handle model auto-load on app startup and auto-unload after inactivity
summary: Implemented in analyst.svelte.ts init() — if inferenceMode='local' and localModelId is set, auto-loads via loadModel() with graceful failure (model may not be downloaded). Inactivity timer runs every 30 seconds; if 5 minutes elapsed since lastGenerationTime and model is not streaming, calls unloadModel(). lastGenerationTime updated at start of each local generation.
notes: Auto-load on init runs asynchronously, doesn't block UI. Inactivity timer uses setInterval (30s). Timer only active when account is initialized.
decisions_made: setInterval (30s) for timer rather than per-token timestamp check. Graceful failure for auto-load (model not yet downloaded).

title: Handle download cancellation, disk full, and corrupt GGUF files
summary: Download cancellation: cancel flag checked per chunk in read loop, partial file deleted on cancel. Disk full: WriteError mapped to descriptive message, partial file deleted. Corrupt GGUF: llama-cpp-2 LlamaModelLoadError returned verbatim to user. Externally-deleted files: existence check before load, file-not-found error. All error paths use map_err with descriptive messages (no unwrap panics).
notes: Partial file cleanup in download_model_inner on both cancel and error paths. load_model checks path.exists() before loading. All error handling uses Result<_, String> with descriptive messages.
decisions_made: AtomicBool for cancel flag (checked per 8KB chunk). File existence check before every load attempt. No disk space pre-check (let OS handle via write error).

title: Handle rapid mode switching and concurrent operations
summary: Concurrent downloads: single download guard in LlmState (download_cancel Mutex), second call returns 'A download is already in progress'. Mode switching: messages array unchanged when switching modes (independent state fields). Generation during switch: stop() called before new sendMessage(), cleanupListeners() handles event listener cleanup. Concurrent guard uses AtomicBool pattern matching existing code style.
notes: Mode switch preserves all state (messages, queries, selected tables). Generation stops cleanly before new request begins. Download guard returns descriptive error to second caller.
decisions_made: Simple AtomicBool guard for concurrent downloads. No state machine — single flag with early return guard. Messages preserved across mode switches by design (separate from inference path).
